title: Senior Software Engineer - Apollo Telehealth Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Apollo Telehealth Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
